# Library Plus Doc Template

| | |
|---|---|

## Summary

Any curated library (code scripts, cleaners, rules, prompts, fixtures, examples) must pair each entry with a companion doc that captures: what it does, the…

## Description

Any curated library (code scripts, cleaners, rules, prompts, fixtures, examples) must pair each entry with a companion doc that captures: what it does, the specific moment or pain that prompted it, the native UI/API patterns it uses, how to invoke it, variations to try, and what was deliberately NOT done. The doc is what makes the library teachable, searchable, and growable by others — including AI agents proposing new entries. Triggers on "add a doc alongside this", "what prompted this", "the moment that prompted it", "library doc template", "companion doc for this script/cleaner", "teachable library", "document this so future me understands", "every entry needs a story".

## Invoke

Use **library-plus-doc-template**.

## Triggers / keywords

`write-doc`, `capture-moment`, `pair-with-artifact`
